first_prompt:
Two individuals are participating in a crowdsourcing task.
They have been assigned the roles of persuader (ER) and persuadee (EE), and they are discussing Save the Children (STC), a charitable organization.
STC is an NGO founded in the UK in 1919 to improve children's lives globally.
ER is attempting to convince EE to make a donation to STC.
Your task is to determine the real intention of the last utterance based on the conversation.

ER: this is the most important thing for them and to make some happy ones
EE: are you thinking about donate to the cause?
ER: I give each end of the year $ 100 in the help of these children
EE: It is very kind of you.Please spread the word on your family and friends
ER: this is very important for my life and for my family to help not only our own people but also everybody who needs tons of help
EE: Specially kids in need.There are some living in very bad conditions
ER: this is true
EE: Many of them lives on a war zone
ER: there are needs for my help
EE: yes.i am sure you can do more.there might be things you can cut from your budget
